segment.source: Stacks each feature down the center: a large icon above title and rich-text description, beneath an optional eyebrow, heading, and subheadline — no card frames. Use it for: a small set of high-level value propositions, principles, or key capabilities that deserve a calm, airy presentation. Prefer 'Icon Feature Grid' for denser multi-column icon overviews; 'Minimal Feature Section' when the source content has no icons or visual anchors at all.
